no: Paladin kit: Grey Guards follow a looser code, using unorthodox methods (backstab, invisibility) to protect the innocent. Cannot turn undead, -4 Charisma penalty. Gains Backstab (as Stalker), Stalk (invisibility + AC penalty), and Blade of Justice (scaling smite). Adds to FALLEN, BACKSTAB, CRIPPSTR, and SNEAKATT tables. English only.

passive.desc: No paladin code; never risks falling

activated.effects: Invisibility for positioning. -5 AC for 5 rounds after.
Main-hand strikes as +2 enchantment with +2 THAC0/damage for 4 rounds. Scales to +5 enchantment by lv20.

hlaPool.note: Standard paladin HLA pool (no Turn Undead related HLAs)

spellRestrictions.note: Cannot Turn Undead. Standard paladin spellcasting retained.

new: Paladin with looser code. Gains backstab (as Stalker), Stalk (invisibility + AC penalty), and Blade of Justice (scaling smite). Cannot turn undead, -4 Charisma.

sum: Adds the Grey Guard paladin kit — unorthodox tactics allowed (backstab, invisibility).

co.no: Adds Grey Guard paladin kit with backstab, Stalk, and Blade of Justice.
